creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 09:02:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11/roxbg            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Makes it easy to set the background in rox instead of having to
  having to muck around with the XML API it uses.
  
  -f fill the screen with the image
  -s scale the image with out stretching it
  -c center image and do not scale
  -t tile the image
  
  default: -s
  
  PR:             ports/110152
  Submitted by:   Zane C. Bowers
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.648     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/x11/roxbg/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/roxbg/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/x11/roxbg/pkg-descr (new)
